title: Slam Dunk
sourceNotes: 1993-1996 anime (101 eps) covers manga ch 1-159 approximately. Manga complete at 276 chapters; the Inter-High tournament (Toyotama, Sannoh, Aiwa) is unadapted in the TV series. THE FIRST SLAM DUNK (2022 movie) covers the Sannoh match from the unadapted portion.

mappings.arc: Inter-High Tournament: Toyotama / Sannoh / Aiwa (unadapted in TV; Sannoh covered by 2022 movie)
